completed.name: HQ / prototype void foundation
evidence: Stage QA and cylinder QA routes exist

completed.name: Source library and manifests
evidence: data/alpecca_art_source contains design lock, source manifest, reference board, generation queue, and audit files
Hugging Face source-art dataset is CREATORJD/alpecca-art-library
Hugging Face runtime-assets dataset is CREATORJD/alpecca-runtime-assets

inProgress.name: Runtime matrix adapter
inProgress.goal: Resolve action + vertical tier + 16 horizontal sectors to compiled atlas folders, with local fallback and clear debug readout.

inProgress.name: Reference boards and design lock
inProgress.goal: Keep Alpecca's locked outfit, proportions, white thigh-high leggings, no baked halo/shadow, transparent cutouts, 5ft7 standing class.

inProgress.name: Generate 400+ source-art pieces
inProgress.goal: Generate complete 4K source strips for 16 view sectors, low/eye/high pitch tiers, body actions, mouth shapes, eyes, head turns, hair dynamics, and reactions.

batch1.name: standing-16-sector-foundation
batch1.frameContract: 8 frames per target at 4096px source slots, compiled later to 512px runtime slots after approval

inProgress.name: First generated draft QA
inProgress.goal: Generate a first visual draft for gen-0001 / idle_low_s0 and prove the QA gate rejects non-production output.

draftQa.reason: Built-in draft preserved useful visual direction but did not meet 32768x4096 source strip size, true transparency, or 4K-per-frame promotion requirements.

inProgress.name: 4K frame-tile generation bridge
inProgress.goal: Allow generators that cannot emit a 32768px-wide strip to produce exact 4096x4096 tiles that stitch into the canonical raw_strip.png.

inProgress.name: Cloud generation job package
inProgress.goal: Export batch-1 frame-tile prompts into portable JSONL jobs for Hugging Face, Colab, or another generator, with a safe importer for returned tiles.

inProgress.name: HF/Colab tile worker bridge
inProgress.goal: Run exported JSONL chunks from Hugging Face or disk through any external 4K image generator, while keeping approval/import/stitch gates unchanged.

inProgress.name: Open-source Diffusers tile generator adapter
inProgress.goal: Provide a first concrete generator command that can run in Colab/HF GPU environments and output exact 4096x4096 RGBA PNG tiles for the Stage 4 worker contract.
notes: Uses the same Stage 4 JSONL job format and the existing worker command template.
Crops the correct frame slot from strip-style seed canvases before generation.
Writes exact 4096x4096 RGBA PNG output, then relies on importer, stitcher, and visual QA before promotion.
This is a first open-source adapter; stronger reference-lock/anime generators can replace the command without changing the pipeline.

inProgress.name: Returned-tile visual QA gate
inProgress.goal: Create mechanical reports and contact-sheet previews for generated 4K frame tiles before import, stitch, or runtime promotion.

nextGeneratorRequirement.background: transparent alpha preferred; perfectly flat chroma key acceptable only if QA passes
nextGeneratorRequirement.modelNeed: Use an external/source-art generator capable of 4K-per-frame strip output or segmented 4K source tiles that are stitched and QA checked before approval.
nextGeneratorRequirement.approvalPath: raw_strip.png -> visual QA -> approved/spritesheet.png -> Stage 5 compile --apply

blockedUntilArtExists.name: Compile approved runtime atlases
blockedUntilArtExists.reason: Approved 4K source strips are not present yet; current compile report skips targets with missing approved/spritesheet.png.

blockedUntilArtExists.name: Layered body/expression runtime
blockedUntilArtExists.reason: Needs approved base-body and overlay atlases before promotion.

blockedUntilArtExists.name: Advanced depth/shadow/normal integration
blockedUntilArtExists.reason: Should wait until base matrix assets are visually stable.

pipelineImprovements.name: stale-only 4K seed rebuild
pipelineImprovements.benefit: Rebuilds only missing or wrong-dimension source canvases instead of reprocessing an entire 4K batch.

pipelineImprovements.name: runtime metadata-only Hugging Face sync
pipelineImprovements.benefit: Publishes stage/status/runtime JSON quickly without uploading PNG/WebP/audio payloads.

pipelineImprovements.name: HF/Colab tile worker bridge
pipelineImprovements.benefit: Lets external 4K generators process uploaded Stage 4 jobs while preserving the existing importer, stitcher, QA, and runtime atlas compile gates.

pipelineImprovements.name: Diffusers tile generator adapter
pipelineImprovements.benefit: Provides the first runnable open-source generation command for Stage 4 frame tiles, suitable for Colab/HF GPU environments.

pipelineImprovements.name: returned-tile visual QA
pipelineImprovements.benefit: Creates mechanical QA reports and preview sheets before any generated 4K tile can enter the import/stitch/promotion path.

qaRules: Do not promote fallback walk art as final 16-view art.
Do not upload source/generated art to Cloudflare.
Do not commit large PNG/WebP/audio/video payloads to GitHub.
Do not remove Alpecca's white thigh-high leggings or locked identity details.
Do not bake halo or ground shadow into character source art; render those as separate runtime layers.
Runtime should request compiled atlases, not hundreds of loose images.
